481.reason: [This condition is unsafe: it accesses tokens[tokenPos + 2] without checking if tokenPos + 2 is within bounds; also, the logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef is incorrect—it assumes that any token sequence not followed by '(' belongs to Decl, but this fails when there are no declarations or when FuncDef starts.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is unsafe: it accesses tokens[tokenPos + 2] without checking if tokenPos + 2 is within bounds; also, the logic for distinguishing Decl from FuncDef/MainFuncDef is incorrect—it assumes that any token sequence not followed by '(' belongs to Decl, but this fails when there are no declarations or when FuncDef starts.]

486.reason: [Similarly unsafe: accesses tokens[tokenPos + 1] without bounds check; also, this loop assumes all non-MainFuncDef functions appear before main, but doesn't verify that current token actually starts a FuncDef (e.g., 'void', 'int', 'char' followed by IDENFR and '('), leading to infinite loops or misparsing when input doesn't match expectations.]
